Excellent! Now I see the pattern clearly:
1. When I moved the green dot to bottom-left (rows 42-43, cols 8-9) and clicked the blue shape:

So the mechanic is:
- The green dot's position determines where the clicked color's block will move
- When a block moves, it leaves behind a checkerboard pattern
- The block swaps with whatever was at the target position (or moves to an empty checkerboard position)
